backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a social media backend with posts, stories, comments, notifications, user profiles, Stripe payment integration, blob storage, and access control using mixins and persistent data stores.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (PostCard, Home feed, Profile page, Subscribe/Stripe, StoryViewer) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files including pages, components, and hooks for the social media application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, profile, subscribe, stories, reels, and payment pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with AuthGuard.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: React component that checks admin permissions using useIsCallerAdmin hook and displays access denied message or renders children based on authorization status.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that enforces login via Internet Identity, shows ProfileSetupModal for new users, and renders Outlet for authenticated users with proper loading states.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Comment display and submission component with scrollable list, real-time updates via React Query hooks, and form handling for adding new comments to posts.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostForm.t: Form component for creating posts with text content and optional media upload (up to 10MB), featuring upload progress tracking and toast notifications for success/error states.
Dialog-based form for creating 24-hour expiring stories with required image upload (up to 10MB), including upload progress tracking and preview functionality.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders the navbar, main content area with outlet for routing, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, manages authentication state, and clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with links to Home, Stories, Reels, Profile, and Subscribe pages, featuring mobile menu toggle, notification bell, and login button.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Dropdown notification center displaying unread count badge, showing likes/comments/follows with timestamps, and marking notifications as read on click.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Card component displaying a post with author info, content, optional media, like/comment buttons, and expandable comment section with like state management.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup requiring username and email input, with non-dismissible overlay until profile is created.
frontend/src/components/ReelPlayer.tsx: A video reel player component that auto-plays when in view, displays user info and post content, and includes interactive like and comment buttons with real-time state management.
frontend/src/components/StoryViewer.tsx: A fullscreen story viewer component that displays stories with auto-advancing progress bars, tap navigation, and tracks story views using a 7-second duration per story.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetup.tsx: An admin-only component that provides a form to configure Stripe payment integration by setting the secret key and allowed countries for subscriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: A mutation hook that adds a comment to a post and invalidates the comments query cache for that post upon success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCheckoutSess: A mutation hook that creates a Stripe checkout session with shopping items and redirect URLs, returning the session ID and checkout URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePost.ts: A mutation hook that creates a new post with content and optional media, then invalidates the feed query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateStory.ts: A mutation hook that creates a new story with media and expiration time, then invalidates the active stories query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetActiveStories.t: A query hook that fetches active stories from the backend with automatic refetching every 60 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile with enhanced loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: A query hook that fetches comments for a specific post by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetFeed.ts: A query hook that fetches the main feed of posts from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetNotifications.t: A query hook that fetches user notifications with automatic polling every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React context provider and hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: A query hook that checks if the current authenticated user has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsStripeConfigured: A query hook that checks whether Stripe payment integration has been configured in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useLikePost.ts: A mutation hook that likes a post and invalidates the feed query cache upon success.
frontend/src/hooks/useMarkNotificationAs: React Query mutation hook that marks a notification as read via the actor and invalidates the notifications query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetStripeConfigura: React Query mutation hook that sets Stripe configuration via the actor and invalidates the isStripeConfigured query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeUser.ts: React Query mutation hook that subscribes the current user via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useViewStory.ts: React Query mutation hook that marks a story as viewed via the actor and invalidates the activeStories query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component that displays a feed of posts with a create post form, showing loading state and empty state when no posts exist.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page displaying an error message with options to retry payment or return home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that calls subscribeUser mutation on mount, displays success message, and provides navigation to profile.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page displaying user information, subscription status, post statistics, and a list of the user's posts.
frontend/src/pages/Reels.tsx: Full-screen vertical scrolling reels page that filters video posts and tracks visible reel index for autoplay functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Stories.tsx: Stories page displaying active stories in a horizontal scroll and grid layout, with story viewer modal and create story functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Subscribe.tsx: React page component for subscription management that displays free vs premium plan comparison, handles Stripe checkout session creation, and shows current subscription status with premium features list.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography settings, container queries, animations, and design tokens for a consistent UI theme.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting the social media app architecture (IC backend, React frontend, Stripe payments), existing features, and technical notes about authentication, storage, and media handling.
